prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: NPT-HATCHET-KFD709SERIES-PARENT
Product Type: AXE
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: 11 Inch Stainless Steel Full Tang Hunting Gut Hook Knife Hatchet with Nylon Sheath Survival Gear Camping Accessories
Description: The full tang ASR Outdoor gut hook hunting survival knife or hatchet is a highly specialized tool, specifically designed for field dressing. When assembling your hunting accessories and equipment, a gut hook knife is one of the must-have essentials and welcomed companions to the skinning knife. The gut and hook hunting knife will make all your field dressing tasks easier and more efficient, with its finger groove, sharp and pronounced curve, easy to grip handle and protective carrying sheath.
Search Terms: hatchet camping survival camp throwing sheath tactical hunting gear knife accessories targets deer cordage zombie apocalypse ring tang thumb gut hook notched curved hacking hatchet axe mini camp survavlist green camo black
Features:
- GUT HOOK HUNTING KNIFE: With a finger groove, thumb grip, pronounced curve and paracord handle, this gut hook hunting knife is specifically designed to make any field dressing tasks easier and more efficient
- STAINLESS STEEL HATCHET: The ASR Outdoor gut hook hunting knife is made from quality, durable stainless steel; corrosion-resistant, this hunting knife is built to perform and will last longer than a comparable carbon steel gut hook knife
- PARACORD HANDLE: The ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a paracord wrapped handle, providing extra grip and comfort when field dressing; the paracord rope itself, an essential survival tool, can be unwound in case of emergency, repair or an injury occurs
- NYLON SHEATH: Included with the purchase of the full tang hunting camping survival hatchet knife is a durable fitted black nylon knife sheath that protects the blade; it features additional snap closures to ensure the hunting hatchet stays put when not in use, as well as a hook and loop belt fastener
- SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 11 inches; Weight: 0.6125lbs; Product Dimensions: ; Blade length: 5.75 inches; Blade shape: Gut hook; Material: Stainless steel; Color: Black; Nylon carry sheath included with purchase

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11 in Black Stainless Steel Gut Hook Hatchet

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11-in Black Gut Hook Hunting Knife Hatchet

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang Design, Paracord Handle, Nylon Sheath, Field Dressing Knife, Survival Camping Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Full Tang Stainless Steel, Paracord Wrapped Handle, Nylon Sheath, Thumb Grip, Field Dressing Knife
